queries.question: What is the semester and annual cost of the computer science programme?
queries.sql: SELECT Amount_Per_Semester, Annual_Cost FROM Programs WHERE Name = 'Computer Science'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?amount_per_semester ?annual_cost WHERE {
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?programs p:Amount_Per_Semester ?amount_per_semester .
  ?programs p:Annual_Cost ?annual_cost .
  ?programs p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Computer Science")
}
